description_long: This is a dark, ornate sword with a long, slightly curved blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade is primarily black with subtle red accents, giving it a menacing and mystical appearance. The crossguard is elaborate, featuring gold or bronze metallic elements that curve outward in a decorative fashion, providing both protection and visual flair. The handle is cylindrical, textured, and capped with a rounded pommel, also finished in a metallic gold or bronze tone. The overall design suggests a fantasy or ceremonial weapon, with a focus on both functionality and aesthetics. The sword's craftsmanship and detailing make it stand out as a unique and visually striking object.
description: A dark, ornate sword with a black, slightly curved blade and gold or bronze decorative crossguard and pommel. The handle is textured and the blade features subtle red accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the sword, highlighting the symmetrical blade and ornate crossguard.
description_view_1: Angled view emphasizing the curvature of the blade and the three-dimensional detailing of the crossguard.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the thin profile of the blade and the outward curve of the crossguard.
description_view_3: Angled rear view focusing on the handle's texture and the rounded pommel.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, textured, metallic pommel, gold or bronze finish
